decisions.decision: Sprint page data from fix versions API not Agile Board API
decisions.rationale: SAM project has no Scrum board; fix versions exist and are the correct release tracking mechanism
Jira versions have no native active state; infer from startDate

decisions.decision: sprint_name column reused for fix version name in bugs table
decisions.rationale: Avoids schema migration; LEFT JOIN on name still works
User specified exact color; matches done-state green
WSL2 NTFS path pollution causes worktree files tracked in commits

DashboardPage pattern applied to all post-login pages; backend already returned avatar field

next_action: Commit avatar fix (BugReportPage + SprintPage). Browser UAT avatar + Sprint page. Then /gsd-plan-phase 5.
context_notes: Phase 04 fully closed. Second session May 13: fixed Jira user avatar on all post-login pages. BugReportPage and SprintPage were showing static SVG person icon in navbar; updated both to conditionally render user.avatar (24x24 circular img) with SVG fallback — matching DashboardPage pattern exactly. Backend /api/auth/me already returned avatar from Jira avatarUrls.48x48. No backend changes needed. Phase 05 Export is next: export buttons already stubbed as no-ops in BugReport and Sprint pages; backend needs openpyxl + python-docx added to requirements.
